name: Sandy Williams's Tortas De Papa (Potato Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil the potatoes for 15 minutes or until well cooked; drain.
2. When cool enough to handle but not cold, peel the potatoes. Mash them in a large bowl and add salt to taste, mixing thoroughly. Set aside.
3. Using a blender, coarsely chop the cheese. Combine the mashed potatoes and chopped cheese, mixing with your fingers until combined.
4. Add eggs to the mixture and continue mixing by hand until smooth. Taste and adjust seasoning if necessary.
5. Heat oil in a frying pan over medium heat. Scoop about 2 tablespoons of the potato mixture and gently pat it out into a small cake using your fingers, flipping from hand to hand until uniform, about 3 inches in diameter and 1/2 inch thick.
6. Place the potato cake in the hot oil and fry for about 3-4 minutes on each side until golden brown.
7. Remove from the pan and drain on paper towels. Pat the cake dry with your fingers before stacking them on a platter in an oven set to warm until ready to serve.
8. After all cakes are stacked, dip your fingers in water to prevent sticking and add more oil to the frying pan for each batch.
9. Serve with salsa.
